[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ fullwidth=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ bottom_divider_style=”wave2″ bottom_divider_color=”#f5e9ad” bottom_divider_height=”50px” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_fullwidth_code _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]In your html page, add the snippet and call gtag_report_conversion when someone clicks on the chosen link or button. –>[/et_pb_fullwidth_code][et_pb_fullwidth_header title=”Lunch Box Menu” text_orientation=”center” _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”rgba(0,0,0,0.5)” background_image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/LX2-53.jpg” background_blend=”overlay” custom_padding=”||88px|||” title_text_shadow_style=”preset1″ title_text_shadow_color=”#e02b20″ global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_fullwidth_header][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”#f5e9ad” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Daily Meals Delivery Services

To provide the best lunch box in Singapore, we have our own high quality of chefs with experience in various cuisines and years of experience to ensure the highest quality of food is sent to you. Packed in a compartmentalized styrofoam box and well packed to ensure that you get your fill with our lunch box and to ensure the quality of the lunch box sent to you is perfect for consumption, your lunch box will be delivered by our in house daily meals delivery team. Please browse our lunch box menu below featuring up to 3 menus with more than 100 dishes to choose from, there is an endless array of options for you and your guest to choose from. For corporate orders, enjoy lunch box delivery to your workplace with a healthier option of no MSG, no preservatives, low salt and 100% vegetable oil from $4.50/packet with a diverse menu to choose from. For customized and long term orders of daily meals delivery, please kindly contact us at 6815 9119 or email us at enquiry@houseofcatering.com.sg.[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”#f5e9ad” custom_padding=”0px||0px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_3,1_3,1_3″ use_custom_gutter=”on” make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ width=”100%” module_alignment=”center” custom_margin=”-4px|auto||auto||” custom_padding=”0px|||||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Basic Lunch Box Menu” url=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/basic-menu/” image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/lunchbox.jpg” _builder_version=”4.16″ text_orientation=”center” global_colors_info=”{}”]

$6.50/pax (1 Main + 1 Side + 1 Vegetable) Min. 30 pax

All food are packed in disposable microwavable container / aluminum. Biodegradable disposable cutlery provided.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Satisfying Lunch Box Menu” url=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/satisfying-menu/” image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/lunchbox-1.jpg” _builder_version=”4.16″ text_orientation=”center” global_colors_info=”{}”]

$7.50/pax (2 Main + 1 Side + 1 Vegetable) Min. 20 pax

All food are packed in disposable microwavable container / aluminum. Biodegradable disposable cutlery provided.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Fulfilling Lunch Box Menu” url=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/fulfilling-menu/” image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/lunchbox-2.jpg” _builder_version=”4.16″ text_orientation=”center” global_colors_info=”{}”]

$8.50/pax (1 Main + 1 Side + 1 Vegetable + 1 Seafood) Min. 15 pax

All food are packed in disposable microwavable container / aluminum. Biodegradable disposable cutlery provided.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
